publishedAbstract: - The journal logs of worker node prints ``` ceph: mds0 hung ceph: mds0 caps went stale, renewing ceph: mds0 caps stale libceph: mon0 (1)172.x.x.x:6789 session lost, hunting for new mon libceph: mds0 (1)172.x.x.x:6801 socket closed (con state OPEN) libceph: osd2 (1)172.x.x.x:6801 socket closed (con state OPEN) libceph: mon1 (1)172.x.x.x:6789 session established libceph: mds0 (1)172.x.x.x:6801 session reset ceph: mds0 closed our session ceph: mds0 reconnect start ```- The unmount operation is hung with the below traceback: ``` worker0.net kernel: INFO: task argus:1947669 blocked for more than 600 seconds. worker0.net kernel: Tainted: G X----------- 4.18.0-372.73.1.el8_6.x86_64 #1 worker0.net kernel: "echo 0 > /proc/sys/kernel/hung_task_timeout_secs" disables this message. worker0.net kernel: Call Trace: worker0.net kernel:__schedule+0x2d1/0x860 worker0.net kernel: schedule+0x55/0xf0 worker0.net kernel: io_schedule+0x12/0x40 worker0.net kernel: wait_on_page_bit+0x123/0x220 worker0.net kernel:? file_fdatawait_range+0x20/0x20 worker0.net kernel:__filemap_fdatawait_range+0x88/0xf0 worker0.net kernel:?__filemap_fdatawrite_range+0xd9/0x100 worker0.net kernel: file_write_and_wait_range+0x7a/0xa0 worker0.net kernel: ceph_fsync+0x4a/0x210 [ceph] worker0.net kernel:? syscall_trace_enter+0x1ff/0x2d0 worker0.net kernel: do_fsync+0x38/0x70 worker0.net kernel:__x64_sys_fsync+0x10/0x20 worker0.net kernel: do_syscall_64+0x5b/0x1b0 worker0.net kernel: entry_SYSCALL_64_after_hwframe+0x61/0xc6 worker0.net kernel: RIP: 0033:0x40712e worker0.net kernel: Code: Unable to access opcode bytes at RIP 0x407104. worker0.net kernel: RSP: 002b:000000c0001fb888 EFLAGS: 00000206 ORIG_RAX: 000000000000004a worker0.net kernel: RAX: ffffffffffffffda RBX: 0000000000000025 RCX: 000000000040712e worker0.net kernel: RDX: 0000000000000000 RSI: 0000000000000000 RDI: 0000000000000025 worker0.net kernel: RBP: 000000c0001fb8c8 R08: 0000000000000000 R09: 0000000000000000 worker0.net kernel: R10: 0000000000000000 R11: 0000000000000206 R12: 0000000000000000 worker0.net kernel: R13: ffffffffffffffff R14: 000000c0000061a0 R15: 0000000000d80cc0 worker0.net kernel: libceph: osd2 (1)172.x.x.x:6801 socket closed (con state OPEN) worker0.net kernel: BUG: Dentry 00000000a6ca83af{i=10000003cbf,n=alarmHistory} still in use (1) [unmount of ceph ceph] ```
publishedTitle: ODF - Unmount of Cephfs client fails with traceback : BUG: Dentry still in use (1) [unmount of ceph ceph]
